description: You are a plant Safety Coordinator at a manufacturing facility. Format the Cincinnati 1000-Ton Hydraulic Press Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) procedure currently open in Calligra Words (/home/ga/Documents/LOTO_Cincinnati_Press.odt) to comply with the OSHA visual standards defined in the LOTO_Style_Guide.txt on the Desktop. The final document must include a centered title block, heading styles, tables for pipe-delimited data, and numbered lists for sequential steps. Save the document when complete.
